name: Perfect Couple
overview: At 40, successful lawyer Chen Shan struggles to balance her demanding career and strained marriage. As her husband Sun Lei grows distant and a new client challenges her professionally and emotionally, their relationship begins to unravel.

trailers.title: OST《完美伴侣  Perfect Couple》 | Ending song《一滴泪的时间 Yi Di Lei De Shi Jian》by Zhao Zihua
